case_title: DAVID MARTIN VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-21-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERIVCE $40 SERVED OCT-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
